item.title: Macy's is selling a $37 throw with a gorgeous 3D cable-knit design
item.description: One shopper said it's "luxurious to the touch."

item.title: Breville's popular $270 Nespresso machine that makes 'phenomenal' coffee is on sale for 40% off
item.description: It's even backed by more than 12,000 five-star ratings.

item.title: I shop for a living, and this $29 pull-out kitchen organizer is the home staple everyone should own
item.description: Shoppers say it makes "daily life easier," and I agree.

item.title: Ikea has a 'sturdy' basic 5-tier bookshelf for just $33
item.description: "Despite its slim profile, it offers plenty of storage."

item.title: IKEA hot dog raises questions about Costco's $1.50 deal
item.description: As someone who's been shopping at Costco for 20 years and counting, I'm well aware that the store's legendary food court has long been a huge draw for...
